title: 2 Skilling Dansk - Frederik III (Shield type VI)

obverse.description: Crowned elongated shield (rectangular in shape with rounded bottom) with arms of Denmark has circular ornamentations at sides. The shield can be within a circle (km# 249.1) or not (km# 249.2). Legend is around, outside inner circle if present.
obverse.lettering_translation: Frederick III (King of) Denmark by the Grace of God

reverse.description: Value in letters on four lines inside a beaded circle. Legend outside with date and mintmark at end.
reverse.lettering_translation: King of Norway, of the Wends and the Goths

comments:
This coin as well as all other skilling coins has many variants, especially in the shape of Shield of arms and in the lettering. Only the principal are listed below.
(l) = Clasp mintmark
